title: Feature Selection
content_md:
# Feature Selection

Not all variables are useful.

```python
from sklearn.feature_selection import SelectKBest
import numpy as np
selector = SelectKBest(k=3)
best = selector.fit_transform(X, y)
```

Goal: keep only the useful features for prediction.

questions.question: Why do we select features?
questions.answer: To improve model performance and reduce noise.

questions.question: What does k represent in SelectKBest?
questions.answer: The number of top features to keep.

questions.question: What happens with too many features?
